headline: QUALCOMM (QCOM) Stock Could Be 34.2% Overvalued Despite Its Recent Rally
summary: QUALCOMM (QCOM) is back in focus after a recent stretch of strong share price performance, with the stock up over the past week, month and past 3 months. This has prompted fresh attention from momentum driven investors. See our latest analysis for QUALCOMM. Looking beyond this week, QUALCOMM’s recent strength includes an 11.65% 30 day share price return and a 74.06% 90 day share price return, while the 1 year total shareholder return sits at 52.57%. headline: 3 Semiconductor Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Semiconductors are the picks and shovels of modern technology. The way we live and work is also changing with AI, which is creating secular demand for more powerful chips. As a result, the industry has seen solid stock price performance over the last six months as its gain of 125% has outpaced the S&P 500’s 8.9% return.

headline: Apple's Price Warning Sends Memory Chips To A Record, Accenture Cracks 18%
summary: Tim Cook's warning that iPhone and Mac prices are going up because memory chips have become too expensive lit a fire under the storage names. Micron printed a record $1,133. Intel added 10% on the back of the Trump stake math. Accenture took an 18% beating on weak consulting bookings. Vance's cancelled trip to Switzerland nudged oil back above $80.

headline: 2 Reasons QCOM is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
